title: erigeron mutsuensis
intro: Erigeron mutsuensis, also known as Mutsu Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erigeron mutsuensis include soothing digestive issues, relieving menstrual cramps, and reducing fever, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Erigeron mutsuensis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
